summary: Iteration 3 testing complete. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All new features working: geocoder endpoints (Photon + Nominatim), bulk import admin endpoint, Indore seed data (51+ incidents). Frontend geocoder UI with debounced search, quick-picks, and confirmation lines working. Admin bulk import panel functional. All regression tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Geocoder implementation uses Photon as primary with Nominatim fallback - good resilience
Bulk import endpoint properly validates admin auth and returns 401/403 appropriately
Indore seed data is idempotent (checks for existing source:public_dataset:indore)
RouteSearchSheet has proper debouncing (380ms) for geocode API calls
All new interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Quick-pick buttons use Indore landmarks with correct coordinates
seed_data_creation: 51+ incidents seeded in Indore area via /api/dev/seed-incidents (source: public_dataset:indore). Additional 5 test incidents created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs and frontend flows working correctly. New iteration 3 features: (1) Geocoder endpoints /api/geocode/search and /api/geocode/reverse using Photon + Nominatim, (2) Admin bulk import /api/admin/incidents/bulk, (3) Indore seed data with 51 realistic incidents. Frontend RouteSearchSheet rewritten with GeocodeField component, debounced search, Indore quick-picks (Rajwada, Sarafa Bazaar, Vijay Nagar, Palasia, Bhawarkuan, Indore Station, Airport). Admin page has BulkImportPanel. Map default center is Indore (22.7196, 75.8577).

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: SIMULATION mode - logs instead of sending real SMS. Response contains simulated=true

backend_new: GET /api/geocode/search?q=Rajwada Indore - returns results with lat/lng/label/short
GET /api/geocode/search?q=x (< 2 chars) - returns empty results gracefully
POST /api/admin/incidents/bulk (admin auth) - imports incidents, returns inserted count
GET /api/incidents - returns 51+ incidents clustered around Indore
backend_regression: GET /api/auth/me - returns demo user with is_admin=true
frontend_new: RouteSearchSheet with GeocodeField components for origin and destination
Origin input with placeholder 'Search address, landmark, or area…'
Geocode search dropdown with results (origin-result-0, origin-result-1, etc.)
7 Indore quick-pick buttons: Rajwada, Sarafa Bazaar, Vijay Nagar, Palasia, Bhawarkuan, Indore Station, Airport
'Use my location' button for origin field
Admin BulkImportPanel with textarea, 'Load sample' button, 'Import' button
Bulk import success message showing 'Imported N incidents · total now M'
frontend_regression: Landing page with gov masthead, tricolor, BGI Hackathon 2026 branding
SOS panel opens and shows trusted contacts
Admin nav link visible for admin user
